name: Double Chocolate Fudgey Brownies with Walnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Line a 13-inch x 9-inch glass pan with double layers of tin foil, extending the ends over the shorter side by a couple of inches.
3. Grease the tin foil with butter.
4. In a large microwave-safe bowl, place unsweetened chocolate and butter. Nuke until melted (about 3 minutes).
5. Mix in sugar and blend well. Allow to cool slightly.
6. Add the three eggs; beat in well.
7. Add the flour and blend it in well.
8. Add the chopped walnuts.
9. Pour batter into the prepared baking dish.
10. Sprinkle chocolate chips evenly over the batter.
11. Bake at 325 degrees for 30 minutes or until a toothpick comes out clean.
12. Remove from oven and allow to cool before cutting.
13. Cut into portions as desired. This recipe should yield several pieces of dense, chewy, fudgey brownies.
